verses.1: I am a rose of Sharon,
verses.3: As the apple tree among the trees of the wood,
verses.4: He brought me to the banquet hall.
verses.6: His left hand is under my head.
verses.7: I adjure you, daughters of Jerusalem,
verses.9: My beloved is like a roe or a young deer.
verses.10: My beloved spoke, and said to me,
verses.11: For behold, the winter is past.
verses.12: The flowers appear on the earth.
verses.13: The fig tree ripens her green figs.
verses.14: My dove in the clefts of the rock,
verses.16: My beloved is mine, and I am his.
verses.17: Until the day is cool, and the shadows flee away,
